---
id: create-guardrails-version
title: "Create guardrails version"
description: "Create a new guardrails version. Deactivates the previous version atomically. Takes effect immediately — no server restart required. Requires elevated key header: X-Elevated-Key."
sidebar_label: "Create guardrails version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create guardrails version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/guardrails"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a new guardrails version. Deactivates the previous version atomically. Takes effect immediately — no server restart required. Requires elevated key header: X-Elevated-Key.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
